name: Date picker
goal: Provide a labelled date / time / datetime / month / week picker wrapped around a native HTML input.
description: Form primitive that delegates date / time parsing, keyboard handling, and the calendar popup to the browser's native input. Mirrors ce-input's label / help / error / prefix / suffix layout for consistency across the forms group. The `type` attribute switches between date (default), time, datetime-local, month, and week. min, max, step are forwarded as-is. Emits ce-input per keystroke and ce-change on commit.

props.name: value
props.description: ISO-shaped value (YYYY-MM-DD, HH:mm, etc.) matching the chosen type.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name; echoed in ce-change detail.

props.name: type
props.description: Which native picker variant to render.

props.name: help
props.description: Helper text below the field; hidden when error is set.

props.name: error
props.description: Error text below the field; overrides help when present.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder forwarded to the native input (mostly visible on type=text fallback).

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum value forwarded to the native input.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum value forwarded to the native input.

props.name: step
props.description: Step value forwarded to the native input.

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the control as required and renders an asterisk on the label.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Renders the invalid border styling; aria-invalid follows.

events.name: ce-input
events.description: Fired on every value change (native input event).

slots.name: prefix
slots.description: Inline content rendered before the native control.

slots.name: suffix
slots.description: Inline content rendered after the native control.

a11y.notes: Delegates to the native input so keyboard navigation, the calendar popup, OS locale, and screen-reader semantics come from the browser. Label is associated via label[for]=input.id. aria-invalid follows the invalid prop / error message.
